scripts.dev:all: concurrently -k -n gateway,auth,catalog,jobseeker,employer,application -c auto "bun run --cwd gateway dev" "bun run --cwd services/auth dev" "bun run --cwd services/catalog dev" "bun run --cwd services/jobseeker dev" "bun run --cwd services/employer dev" "bun run --cwd services/application dev"
scripts.db:generate:all: bun run --cwd services/auth db:generate && bun run --cwd services/catalog db:generate && bun run --cwd services/jobseeker db:generate && bun run --cwd services/employer db:generate && bun run --cwd services/application db:generate
scripts.db:push:all: bun run --cwd services/auth db:push && bun run --cwd services/catalog db:push && bun run --cwd services/jobseeker db:push && bun run --cwd services/employer db:push && bun run --cwd services/application db:push
scripts.seed:all: bun run --cwd services/auth db:seed && bun run --cwd services/catalog db:seed && bun run --cwd services/jobseeker db:seed && bun run --cwd services/employer db:seed && bun run --cwd services/application db:seed
